The tree-lined residential streets and proximity to Woodlawn Cemetery's green spaces mean crickets are a common concern for homeowners and apartment dwellers alike in this historic Bronx neighborhood.

faqs.question: Why are crickets so common in Woodlawn homes?
faqs.answer: Woodlawn's abundance of green spaces, including proximity to Van Cortlandt Park and Woodlawn Cemetery, provides ideal cricket habitats. As temperatures drop in fall or during hot summer days, crickets migrate indoors seeking shelter, moisture, and food sources, making homes and apartments in the area particularly vulnerable to infestations.

faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Woodlawn?
faqs.answer: Cricket control services in Woodlawn typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment method required. This includes inspection, treatment, and follow-up services to ensure complete elimination of the cricket problem.

Complete elimination typically takes 1-2 weeks as we target both adult crickets and their hiding spots. We provide follow-up visits to ensure all crickets are removed and entry points are sealed.

faqs.question: Are cricket control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for children and pets when applied by our trained professionals.
